title: Our Galaxy Seen from Space!

scenes.text: Imagine seeing the Milky Way from orbit with stunning clarity!
This breathtaking view reveals the intricate structure of our galaxy—spanning over a hundred thousand light-years.
Our galaxy contains billions of stars, each with its own unique systems.
What kinds of worlds could be out there, waiting to be discovered?
scenes.label: ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES!

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: Experience the Milky Way from orbit and marvel at its vastness and beauty. Follow for daily science!
